snippet.title: Fast-Tracking Innovation for the Digital Demand Revolution with Carol Tomé UPS at CNBC Evolve 2021
snippet.description:
As online shopping has grown, so has the demand for delivery speed. Find out how UPS, which delivers 5.5 billion packages per year, has developed its technology and logistics business to meet customer and client needs while keeping its workforce safe amid the pandemic.

Carol Tomé, UPS CEO
Interviewed by: Suzy Welch, CNBC Contributor

Join us in July for our next CNBC Evolve Global Summit: https://bit.ly/3be78r2
More from the CNBC Events: http://www.CNBCEvents.com Subscribe to the 
CNBC Events Marketing Newsletter here: https://bit.ly/3QlH7pO 

Follow on Twitter: https://twitter.com/cnbcevents 
Follow on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/cnbcevents
#CNBC #Evolve #Innovation

snippet.title: UPS CEO Carol Tomé discusses recent earnings, recession risks and end-of-year outlook
snippet.description:
UPS CEO Carol Tomé joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss what gave Tome the confidence to reaffirm UPS' guidance, if a worldwide recession is on the horizon and if the company's pricing resiliency can continue. snippet.title: Carol Tomé, CEO of UPS, on pandemic innovations and major trends | State of American Business 2022
snippet.description: At the U.S. Chamber’s State of American Business (#SOAB) event, UPS CEO Carol Tomé detailed pandemic innovations, including drone vaccine delivery and battery-powered aircraft, and predicted that investing in sustainability and technology are two major trends that aren’t going away.
